description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant spirit of celebration with our unique email template designed for a festive Mardi Gras event. Perfect for bars and e-commerce platforms, it captures the essence of a lively parade and party atmosphere. Highlighting the allure of tantalizing cocktails and drinks, it sets the mood for a night of revelry. The template also features an appetizing section dedicated to snacks, appealing to food and beverage businesses. Its dark mode aesthetic adds a touch of sophistication, making your Mardi Gras event standout. Whether you're promoting a dazzling Mardi Gras event or offering special deals, this template effectively communicates the infectious energy of this beloved tradition.
short_description: Join the Mardi Gras celebration with our unique email template, ideal for bars and e-commerce. Features enticing visuals of cocktails, drinks, and snacks, capturing the lively parade and party spirit. Dark mode design adds a sophisticated touch. Perfect for promoting events or special deals.

designer.description: I am a Polish senior digital designer and email developer based in London UK. I am fully focused on creating beautiful, functional, and bulletproof emails and landing pages, designed with purpose and based on user experience.

html_data:
PARTY

 

Celebrate with us this year!

Join us on Fat Tuesday for the best masquerade party in New Orleans! Wear your costume, parade up and down Bourbon Street and watch the beads fly. Then head upstairs to our classic Old New Orleans style whisky bar where our live accordionist, Michael Snider (from "The Treme" fame) will have everyone dancing to New Orleans' most swinging music until the wee hours of the morning. Be sure to get there early enough to vote on your favorite costume because we'll have a costume contest later in the evening with prizes for the winner. And yes, of course there will be food and drink specials!!!

Read More

Rise the glass!

$ 9.55

$ 9.55

$ 9.55

 

Join the parade

 

Start: Corner Constance & 17th Street.

Finish: Houma Blvd  Shopping Center.

On a way pop-in for a drink, and us afterwards, to all night celebration.

4338 St Charles Ave, New Orleans, LA 70115, United States

Find a way
